chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S-259 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.2160/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 04.07.2025 Mr. Allah Wassayo Ujjan, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, D.P.G. ******** Learned D.P.G files report on behalf of respondent No.1, taken on record whereas learned counsel for applicant submits that detenue Mst.Maria daughter of applicant Mushtaque Ahmed has been recovered and produced by Police of P.S New Pind Sukkur before learned Additional Sessions Judge-V, Sukkur where he statement was recorded and she was set at liberty to go where she wants, copy of such statement of alleged detenue has been filed, taken on record. The purpose of filing this Criminal Misc. Application has been served and the detenue is at liberty to exercise her rights in accordance with law. The Criminal Misc. Application is disposed of alongwith listed application in the above terms. J U D G E
